title: C.H. Robinson Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
text: EDEN PRAIRIE, Minn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--C.H. Robinson Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

title: Using Return On Capital Employed To Generate Alpha With Dividend Aristocrats
text: Return on Capital Employed (ROCE) is a financial ratio that measures a company's profitability and efficiency in utilizing its capital to generate returns. Strategies that focus on investing in companies with high ROCE or significant improvements in ROCE have historically outperformed the overall market. ROCE should be incorporated into stock research as it is an important metric for evaluating the long-term performance of a business.

title: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Appoints David Bozeman as Its New CEO
text: David Bozeman will take charge as C.H. Robinson's (CHRW) new CEO from Jun 26.

title: Bozeman has a proving curve at C.H. Robinson
text: The selection of David Bozeman as the new CEO of C.H. Robinson Worldwide Inc. came as a surprise to most people.

title: C.H. Robinson Appoints Dave Bozeman Chief Executive Officer
text: EDEN PRAIRIE, Minn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $CHRW #CHRobinson--C.H. Robinson Appoints Dave Bozeman Chief Executive Officer.

title: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Likely to Hire Its New CEO From Ford
text: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) is suffering from weak freight demand. As a result, its shares decline 15.1% in a year.

title: C.H. Robinson shares fall after report on CEO succession plan
text: Shares in C.H. Robinson were down 5.3% on Monday and on track for their biggest one-day decline since November after a report that the freight broker's next chief executive would be David Bozeman, an executive at Ford Motor , disappointing some investors who expected the job to go to a board member.

title: C.H. Robinson taps Ford executive as new CEO-sources
text: C.H. Robinson Worldwide Inc. (NASDAQ: CHRW) has chosen David Bozeman, an executive of the Ford Motor Co., as its next CEO, according to people familiar with the matter. The announcement, which is expected to be made as early as Monday, catapults Bozeman to the top job of the nation's largest freight broker.

title: Dividends, Buybacks Aid C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Despite High Capex
text: C.H. Robinson's (CHRW) measures to reward its shareholders are encouraging. Rising capital expenditure poses a threat to the company's bottom line.
